targets.description: Reduction of Specific PM Emission Load

initiatives.name: Green Power Import from DVC
initiatives.description: Arrangement for green power import from DVC at Durgapur (DSP) and IISCO (ISP) plants.
initiatives.outcome: Significant increase in renewable energy from 266 TJ to 1,400 TJ.

scope3Breakdown.note: Entity is in the process of identifying all relevant Scope 3 categories.

enrichment.managementCommentary: Reduced emissions align with global climate goals and enhance SAIL's competitiveness in green steel markets. Sustainability leads to carbon credits and green bond opportunities.

nonCompliance.description: Bhilai Steel Plant: Inefficient operation of Sewage Treatment Plant (STP) in violation of Water Act 1974.
nonCompliance.resolution: Direction issued by CECB; corrective actions being taken.

forwardLooking.description: Implementation of Solid State Interlocking (SSI) and automation up-gradation

qualitativePolicies.P1_ethics: Anti-corruption and ethics policies covered under NGRBC framework.
qualitativePolicies.P3_ohs: Occupational Health & Safety is critical for maintaining uninterrupted operations.
qualitativePolicies.P6_environment: Action plan in place for PM reduction and ZLD implementation.

steelProduction.note: From plan config. Gemini derived ~18.93M t from emissions/intensity.

enrichment.reportingBoundary: Standalone. FY2025 water withdrawal doubling (57M->129M kL) confirmed genuine — expanded operations and inclusion of new reporting units.
